# @m3000/market - Trading UI Components

> A collection of beautifully crafted React components for trading interfaces.

## Overview

@m3000/market is a React component library designed specifically for trading and financial interfaces. It provides primitives for displaying prices, ranked lists, countdowns, receipts, and complex UI blocks like auction interfaces.

## Installation

```bash
pnpm add @m3000/market
```

Import the styles:

```tsx
import "@m3000/market/styles.css";
```

## Components

### Primitives

#### Price
Format cryptocurrency and fiat prices with customizable precision, symbols, and localization.

```tsx
import { Price } from "@m3000/market";

<Price value={12345} decimals={2}>
  <Price.Symbol>$</Price.Symbol>
  <Price.Value />
</Price>
```

Key features:
- BigInt support for precision-safe arithmetic
- Abbreviation (K, M, B) for large values
- Locale-aware formatting
- Compound component pattern

#### Countdown
Countdown timer with semantic labels and custom rendering.

```tsx
import { Countdown } from "@m3000/market";

<Countdown to={new Date(Date.now() + 86400000)}>
  {({ timeString, isExpired }) => (
    <span>{isExpired ? "Expired" : timeString}</span>
  )}
</Countdown>
```

Key features:
- Render prop pattern for full control
- Days, hours, minutes, seconds breakdown
- Show time since expiration option

#### RankedList
Display ranked items with group boundaries and custom dividers.

```tsx
import { RankedList, Text } from "@m3000/market";

<RankedList.Root
  items={players}
  getKey={(p) => p.id}
  boundaries={[3]}
  labels={["Top 3", "Others"]}
>
  <RankedList.Group>
    <RankedList.GroupDivider />
    <RankedList.GroupItem>
      <RankedList.GroupItemValue>
        {(player, ctx) => (
          <div>
            <RankedList.GroupItemIndex />
            <Text>{player.name}</Text>
          </div>
        )}
      </RankedList.GroupItemValue>
    </RankedList.GroupItem>
  </RankedList.Group>
</RankedList.Root>
```

Key features:
- Multiple group boundaries
- Custom group labels
- Preview slots for auction-style rankings
- Compound component pattern

#### Receipt
Build order summaries with items, taxes, fees, and dynamic totals.

```tsx
import { Receipt, Price } from "@m3000/market";

<Receipt decimals={2}>
  <Receipt.Price maxDecimals={2}>
    <Price.Symbol>$</Price.Symbol>
    <Price.Value />
  </Receipt.Price>
  <Receipt.Header>Order Summary</Receipt.Header>
  <Receipt.Item label="Item 1" value={1500n} />
  <Receipt.Subtotal />
  <Receipt.Tax rate={0.1} />
  <Receipt.Total />
</Receipt>
```

Key features:
- BigInt values for precision
- Automatic calculations (subtotal, tax, total)
- Discount and fee support
- Compound component pattern

### Blocks

#### Auction
Complete auction interface with bid rankings, live previews, and stepped bidding.

```tsx
import { Auction } from "@m3000/market";

<Auction.Provider auction={auctionData} currentUser={user}>
  <Auction.Layout>
    <Auction.Artwork />
    <Auction.Info>
      <Auction.StatusTag />
      <Auction.Rankings />
      <Auction.BidForm />
    </Auction.Info>
  </Auction.Layout>
</Auction.Provider>
```

Sub-components:
- Auction.Layout - Responsive layout container
- Auction.Rankings - RankedList-based bid display
- Auction.BidForm - Stepped input with validation
- Auction.StatusTag - Semantic status indicator
- Auction.YourBids - Current user's bid display
- Auction.SuggestedBids - Quick bid buttons

## Copy-Paste Installation (shadcn-style)

Components can also be added via the shadcn CLI:

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://m3000.market/r/price.json
```

This copies the component source code directly into your project.

## Design Tokens

The library uses a semantic color system compatible with Tailwind CSS:
- Primary, secondary, accent colors
- Destructive, success, warning states
- Muted and disabled variations
- Full dark mode support

## Tech Stack

- React 19
- Tailwind CSS v4
- Motion (Framer Motion successor)
- TypeScript

## Links

- Documentation: https://m3000.market/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/m3000/market
- npm: https://npmjs.com/package/@m3000/market
